rules: Marketplace manifest (.claude-plugin/marketplace.json) version must match each plugin's own plugin.json version
Skills must live at plugins/<name>/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md with valid YAML frontmatter (name, description, user-invocable, allowed-tools)
Agents must live at plugins/<name>/agents/<agent-name>.md with valid YAML frontmatter (name, description, model, tools, maxTurns)
Plugin manifest (plugin.json) must use './skills' with ./ prefix for the skills path — bare names cause validation errors
Knowledge docs must live in docs/ with YAML frontmatter (title, type, tags, created, updated) and follow the tier hierarchy: domain > decisions > specs
Skills and agents must not contain executable code — they are pure markdown instructions with YAML frontmatter
Each plugin is self-contained under plugins/<name>/ — no cross-plugin imports or shared files between plugins

versioning: Bump plugins/swe/.claude-plugin/plugin.json version and .claude-plugin/marketplace.json swe entry version in sync for all changes
